外卖小哥赵翊白送女子学校外卖，不料天狗食月，末世突然降临，感染病毒的人全部变成了丧尸，着急忙慌之下，他躲进了女寝，被迫和里面女生一起求生。绝望之际，赵翊白投喂校花，意外绑定末世投喂系统，抽取能力时间停止，投喂女神，就能收获次数！
随时掌控时间，定格时间，赵翊白开始了末世为所欲为之路，从女寝开始，整个世界，都是他的游乐场！
做系统任务，赵翊白获得无限耐久无限子弹冲锋枪，获得末世冲锋装甲战车，获得丧尸同视手环，获得无敌防御公寓，爽！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/209c599d4e40b8823f3519d0a3f9ac9f","author":"AZP小白","author_id":"","book_id":"7483233176182082585","book_name":"被困女大宿舍，校花请我打寒颤","book_short_name":"时间暂停，我在末世无敌了","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7483582560581190206","read_count":"89409","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1464011"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"676","tags":"科幻末世,系统,末世,多女主,求生,囤物资","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/7eba563d51932c3b0786d61274272e15~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432736&x-signature=KYupjrdQ26gqOeIcjAilFoH%2FiHA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"5378633047","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"85"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231452166305935E5009754B57A8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13971,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":18769},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7596286582812443417","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"终于看完但最终章节 550章，至少8-9分，5分鼓励。作者老司机，而且写作手法很幽默。车速很快，也不圣母，人物刻画有特色且真实。前期车速和对话的里面骂人的**也挺牛的。剧情还挺有意思的，逻辑也还算合理。很多人物结合多角色语音听其实挺有特色，也挺搞笑的，个性也挺真实。难得这么多章，我还是一口气听完了，中间有一些是睡觉促眠时听的，醒了后继续看，跳过几章也不影响理解。后面再养个几百章再听吧。
速度我一般认真听的是2倍速，睡觉时1.5倍速，情节淡加速偶尔2.5倍速。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768650651,"group_id":"7483233176182082585","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0JjnttzEiu3Mj9uSGPJbzk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"20219101192535","user_name":"喜欢刺魟的贾姆勒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"20219101192535","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7483233176182082585","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世】【爽文】【多女】【为所欲为】【利己】【暴力】
